name: Confluence
description: Main-agent-only Confluence Cloud browser, mirror, search, and editor.

baseUrl.label: Confluence Base URL
baseUrl.help: Confluence Cloud site root, for example https://xindong.atlassian.net/wiki

defaultSpaceKey.label: Default Space Key
defaultSpaceKey.help: Optional default Confluence space key for create/read operations.

cacheDir.label: Cache Dir
cacheDir.help: Relative path under the main workspace where the local mirror is stored.
